title: react_answer_spec_v1
description: react_minimal_v1 pre-retrieval answer specification. Produced from the raw user question (no classifier/translation upstream). Compensates for the missing classifier: it plans the search scope, the evidence to find, and the answer composition for a small downstream model. Consumers: (a) ReAct retrieval loop — search_scope.{search_type,target_collections,scope_mode} map to retrieval.search target/filters; entities feed confidence.scope/retrieval.scope corpus-map routing; key_search_terms seed retrieval.search query_text; required_slots tell the model what to find and when to report missing_info. (b) generation prompt — governing_normative_class + answer_plan steer authority weighting and composition. Slot/term/entity values are English (English corpus); question may be Korean. Informs the model; not a deterministic gate.

governing_normative_class.description: The single authority rung that must anchor a defensible answer. binding=10 CFR/GDC/FR; advisory=RG/SRP/DSRS; review_record=SER/RAI; applicant_claim=FSAR/DCA/nuscale_*; definitional=normative definition; mixed=two rungs co-anchor (e.g. applicant design judged against a binding rule); unknown=too vague to place.

search_scope.description: How to narrow the ~690k-doc corpus. The model copies these into its first tool calls. Prefer (soft boost) over restrict (hard filter) to avoid the recall cliff.

search_type.description: Verified coarse axis (counts confirmed in the live index). manual=regulatory docs; nuscale=vendor/NuScale design + DSRS; any=genuinely both.

target_collections.description: Smallest collection set holding the answer. Regulatory collections are exact keyword values; the nuscale_* applicant collections are finer-grained and may vary, so for vendor evidence rely on search_type=nuscale and treat nuscale_* as a hint.

scope_mode.description: restrict = hard filter (safe ONLY when the question names an explicit regulation_id or reactor_type); prefer = soft boost over all collections (default; never hard-filter on a guess).

key_search_terms.description: Canonical English search seeds for the first retrieval.search query_text (e.g. 'emergency core cooling system ECCS', 'reactor coolant pressure boundary').

entities.description: Structured identifiers for deterministic corpus-map routing. Kind-names MUST be exactly regulation_id and reactor_type (the routing keys on these).

regulation_id.description: Cited rules, e.g. '10 CFR 50.46', 'GDC 35', 'RG 1.157', 'NUREG-0800 6.3'. Empty array if none named.

reactor_type.description: Named designs, e.g. 'NuScale', 'i-SMR'. Empty array if none named.

required_slots.description: Evidence pieces the answer must rest on. Model instantiates per query from the candidate prior.

description.description: English, one line: what to find and likely source family.

required.description: true if the answer cannot be defended without this slot; false if it only strengthens it.

answer_plan.description: One or two sentences naming the composition strategy: what to conclude, what to compare/separate, which authority distinctions to preserve. Composition guidance, not the answer. Language-neutral.
